name: Databricks
description: Databricks runtime plugin with read-only SQL statement execution and skill guidance.

host.label: Databricks Host
host.help: Workspace host URL, for example https://dbc-xxxx.cloud.databricks.com.

token.label: Databricks Token
token.help: Access token for SQL statement execution.

warehouseId.label: Warehouse ID
warehouseId.help: Default SQL warehouse ID used by databricks_sql_readonly.

allowedCatalogs.label: Allowed Catalogs
allowedCatalogs.help: Optional read-only allowlist. When set, SQL calls must provide a catalog in this list.

allowedSchemas.label: Allowed Schemas
allowedSchemas.help: Optional read-only allowlist. When set, SQL calls must provide a schema in this list.

pollingIntervalMs.label: Polling Interval (ms)
pollingIntervalMs.help: Polling interval for pending/running Databricks statements.

maxPollingWaitMs.label: Max Polling Wait (ms)
maxPollingWaitMs.help: Maximum total wait time for statement polling.

readOnly.label: Read-Only Mode
readOnly.help: Must remain enabled in this iteration.

host.description: Databricks workspace host URL (for example: https://dbc-xxxx.cloud.databricks.com).

token.description: Databricks access token (supports secret input resolution).

warehouseId.description: Default Databricks SQL warehouse ID for statement execution.

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for Databricks requests in milliseconds.

retryCount.description: Retry attempts for transient Databricks request failures.

pollingIntervalMs.description: Polling interval used while statement status is PENDING/RUNNING/QUEUED.

maxPollingWaitMs.description: Maximum total elapsed wait time for statement polling.

allowedCatalogs.description: Optional allowlist of permitted catalogs for read-only SQL.

allowedSchemas.description: Optional allowlist of permitted schemas for read-only SQL.

readOnly.description: Must stay true in this iteration. Mutating SQL operations are blocked.
